citation.title: Tenancy General Information
citation.excerpt:
DEMO CORPUS: This is a simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use.

Tenancy General Information

Tenants and landlords should preserve the rent agreement, rent receipts, deposit proof, move-in and move-out photos, inventory lists, repair bills, messages, and written notices.

Security deposit deductions should be explained with an itemized basis such as unpaid rent, documented damage, agreed painting charges, or repair invoices. Where the agreement is unclear or no itemized bill is provided, the dispute needs careful evidence review.

Evict...

citation.title: Legal Aid and Safety General Information
citation.excerpt:
DEMO CORPUS: This is a simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use.

Legal Aid and Safety General Information

For high-risk employment or tenancy disputes, consider speaking with a qualified lawyer, legal aid clinic, district legal services authority, labour department helpdesk, or appropriate local rent/civil authority depending on the state and facts.

Do not forge evidence, impersonate officials or lawyers, threaten the other party, blackmail, break locks, or publish private information. Use written, polite, factual communication and kee...

citation.title: Tenancy General Information
citation.excerpt: Rent increase, lock-in period, repairs, and maintenance disputes depend on the agreement, local law, notices, and evidence of condition or payment.

rule_checks.title: Eviction or vacation issue needs written process
evidence: Eviction or demand to vacate must be communicated in writing
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Eviction/vacation disputes are sensitive and should be handled through written communication and applicable local process.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Ask for written notice and avoid confrontation, lock-breaking, or self-help steps.

rule_checks.title: Repair or maintenance evidence needed
evidence: repair charges from the security deposit only with itemized bills and photos
Painting or cleaning charges must be supported by the rent agreement and actual bills
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Repair responsibility often turns on proof of condition, cause, bills, and agreement wording.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Collect photos, move-in report, receipts, messages, and repair estimates.

potential_provision_matches.section_title: Definitions.- In this Act, unless the context otherwise
potential_provision_matches.source_quote:
3. Definitions.- In this Act, unless the context otherwise
requires,-
  (a) "building" means any building or hut or part of a building
or hut other than a farm house, let or to be let separately and
includes,-
        (i)   the garden, grounds and out-houses, if any
              appurtenant to such building, hut or part of such
              building or hut and let or to be let along with such
              building or hut or part of building or hut;

                                   613

        (ii)    any furniture or equipment supplied by the landlord
                for the use in such
potential_provision_matches.why_relevant: Potentially relevant to security deposit and itemized deduction review.

Painting or cleaning charges must be supported by the rent agreement and actual bills

potential_provision_matches.section_title: Tenancy agreement to be in writing.- (1)
potential_provision_matches.source_quote:
4. Tenancy agreement to be in writing.- (1)
Notwithstanding anything contained in section 107 of the Transfer
of Property Act, 1882 (Central Act 4 of 1882), no person shall,
after the commencement of this Act, let or take on rent any
premises except by an agreement in writing.
   (2) Where in relation to a tenancy created before the
commencement of this Act no agreement in writing was entered
into the landlord and the tenant shall enter into an agreement in
writing with regard to the tenancy and deposit a copy of thereof
before the prescribed authority.
        Provided that where the landlord

uncertainties: Only demo corpus material may have been retrieved; it is not a complete statement of Indian law.

steps: Preserve the rent agreement, receipts, messages, notices, and property-condition evidence.
Ask the landlord for itemized deposit deductions with bills and photos.
Communicate in writing and keep the tone factual.
Avoid self-help eviction, lock-breaking, threats, or confrontation.
Consider the appropriate rent/civil authority route depending on state and facts.
evidence_checklist: Deposit payment proof and rent receipts
Repair bills, inspection notes, and itemized deductions
Police verification or society communications if relevant
remedy_plan.draft_message:
Hello,

Please share an itemized written statement for the proposed security deposit deductions, including photos, bills/receipts, and the agreement clause relied on. I would also appreciate confirmation of the refundable balance and expected payment date.

Regards,
[Your Name]
remedy_plan.escalation_note: Tenancy procedures vary by state; confirm the local route before filing.
